title: Rewrite agents-md-init SKILL.md — Check-not-Ask single-round Architecture Review (Shadow Mirroring version)
description: Rewrite SKILL.md from passive 3-Phase interview to active Check-not-Ask protocol with Shadow Mirroring physical topology. Phase 0: active reconnaissance reading forensic.json assertions[] + candidate_files[] within 15-file × 100-line hard budget (overflow → pattern-family top-3 fallback). Phase 1: single-screen batch Architecture Review displaying framework/architecture_pattern/proposed_rule/domain_boundary partitions with evidence file:line anchors + HIGH implicit accept / MEDIUM-LOW explicit. Phase 2: auto-construct writing ONLY to .fabric/agents/ mirror tree — does NOT generate colocated AGENTS.md, does NOT write .claude/rules/, does NOT write @import. Hard rules split into DISPLAY/WRITE: NEVER WRITE unconfirmed; DISPLAY HIGH = implicit accept; coverage/evidence quantified thresholds. Cross-cutting rules go into .fabric/agents/_cross/{concern}.md.

files.target: Entire file — Precondition, Phase 1/2/3 sections, Hard Rules section
files.change: Rewrite Precondition to mandate reading forensic.json assertions[] AND candidate_files[]. Rewrite Phase 0 (active recon): Read candidate_files[] within 15×100 line hard budget; if budget exceeded fall back to top-3 per pattern family; may Grep for supplemental evidence. Rewrite Phase 1 (single-screen batch Check): display 4-partition Architecture Review (framework / architecture_pattern / proposed_rule / domain_boundary); each item shows confidence icon (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) + evidence file:line anchor; HIGH items displayed with implicit-accept semantics (if user does not object, considered confirmed); MEDIUM/LOW require explicit confirmation. Rewrite Phase 2 (auto-construct): writes .fabric/agents/ mirror tree (1:1 source directory structure); cross-cutting rules to .fabric/agents/_cross/{concern}.md; updates .fabric/init-context.json with confidence_snapshot per invariant; updates .fabric/agents.meta.json; NEVER generates colocated AGENTS.md; NEVER writes @import lines; NEVER generates .claude/rules/. Rewrite Hard Rules section: DISPLAY/WRITE split — NEVER WRITE unconfirmed invariant to .fabric/agents/; DISPLAY HIGH allows implicit accept; HIGH confidence standard = coverage.ratio≥0.8 + co_occurring_patterns.length≥2 OR AST-level marker; evidence anchors must be file:line format.

implementation: Read templates/claude-skills/agents-md-init/SKILL.md in full to understand current structure before rewriting
Design Phase 0 pseudocode: read forensic.json, iterate candidate_files[], count tokens (files×lines), emit fallback trigger when budget exceeded
Design Phase 1 display template: 4-partition table with confidence icon (🟢HIGH/🟡MEDIUM/🔴LOW) + evidence anchor + accept/reject guidance
Write new SKILL.md: Precondition section — mandate forensic.json assertions[] AND candidate_files[] read
Write Phase 0 section with hard-budget rules (15 files max, 100 lines each; overflow = pattern-family top-3 fallback)
Write Phase 1 section with single-screen batch Check format; HIGH implicit accept semantics clearly stated

Write Phase 2 section: Shadow Mirroring write target (.fabric/agents/ only); mirror tree construction rules; _cross/ subtree for cross-cutting; zero colocated AGENTS.md; zero @import; zero .claude/rules/
Write Hard Rules section with DISPLAY/WRITE split; update protected tokens list to include .fabric/agents/
Verify SKILL.md contains no references to @import, .claude/rules/, or colocated AGENTS.md generation (per R3-CQ2/CQ4)

reference.pattern: Claude Code /init paradigm: explore → gap-fill → reviewable proposal
reference.examples: conclusions.json recommendations[1].steps contains Phase 0/1/2 pseudocode and hard rule DISPLAY/WRITE split design; use as implementation blueprint

criteria: SKILL.md Phase 0 explicitly states 15-file × 100-line hard budget with overflow fallback to pattern-family top-3
SKILL.md Phase 1 shows 4 partition types (framework/architecture_pattern/proposed_rule/domain_boundary) with evidence anchor format file:line
SKILL.md Phase 1 explicitly states HIGH = implicit accept semantics (user silence = confirmed)
SKILL.md Phase 2 states write target is .fabric/agents/ mirror tree ONLY
SKILL.md Phase 2 states cross-cutting rules go to .fabric/agents/_cross/{concern}.md
SKILL.md Hard Rules contain: NEVER WRITE unconfirmed invariant to .fabric/agents/
SKILL.md Hard Rules contain: HIGH confidence standard = coverage.ratio≥0.8 + co_occurring_patterns≥2 OR AST-level marker
SKILL.md contains zero occurrences of @import for generated content
SKILL.md contains zero references to generating .claude/rules/ files
SKILL.md contains zero references to generating colocated AGENTS.md files in business directories
SKILL.md Precondition mandates reading forensic.json assertions[] AND candidate_files[] before Phase 1

rationale.chosen_approach: Full rewrite of SKILL.md following Shadow Mirroring (R3) architecture: all rule files in .fabric/agents/ mirror tree; DISPLAY/WRITE split enables implicit accept for HIGH-confidence assertions while maintaining the NEVER WRITE unconfirmed safety invariant
alternatives_considered: Incremental patch to existing Phase 1/2 (preserves colocated topology assumptions from R2 — incompatible with R3)
Keep Phase 2 generating colocated AGENTS.md but also mirror to .fabric/agents/ (bridge artifact violates R3-CQ4 Zero-Pollution)
decision_factors: R3 user decision: pure Zero-Pollution — no colocated AGENTS.md in business directories
DISPLAY/WRITE split: NEVER infer unconfirmed (existing) conflicts with Matcha implicit accept → resolve by bounding implicit accept to DISPLAY tier only
SKILL allowed-tools already declares Read/Glob/Grep/Bash — no permission change needed
rationale.tradeoffs: Full rewrite is more disruptive but necessary; R2 hybrid topology is incompatible with R3 decisions

manual_checks: Run agents-md-init SKILL on examples/werewolf-minigame-stub after TASK-001 is complete; verify Phase 0 reads candidate_files[] and stays within 15-file budget
Verify Phase 1 output shows single-screen batch with 4 partitions and confidence icons
After user confirmation, verify Phase 2 writes only to .fabric/agents/ (no src/AGENTS.md, no .claude/rules/)
Verify .fabric/agents/_cross/ directory created for any cross-cutting rules
success_metrics: SKILL executes in ≤ 2 user interaction rounds (Phase 1 batch Check + Phase 2 auto-construct)
SKILL output directory .fabric/agents/ contains mirror structure matching source directories
Zero AGENTS.md files created in src/ or packages/ directories
unit: SKILL.md manual review against convergence criteria checklist
integration: End-to-end SKILL run on werewolf-minigame-stub fixture (part of TASK-007)

risks.description: SKILL.md file is a Claude Skill template (not TypeScript); no compile-time validation available — logical errors only catch at runtime
risks.mitigation: Perform manual review walkthrough of SKILL against each convergence criterion; use test fixture (TASK-007) to validate behavior
risks.fallback: Iterative patch SKILL.md after TASK-007 reveals behavioral gaps

risks.description: Mirror tree construction rules in Phase 2 may be ambiguous for monorepo structures (e.g., packages/server → .fabric/agents/packages/server/)
risks.mitigation: Explicitly define mirror path derivation rule in SKILL.md: strip project root prefix, prepend .fabric/agents/
risks.fallback: Add example in SKILL.md showing werewolf-minigame-stub mirror path derivation
